series_metadata.series_description: The Administrative Rules includes original, revised, and final filed rules; worksheets and information used to draft rules; Common Sense Initiative (CSI) proceedings (or documents); Joint Committee on Agency Rule Review (JCARR) proceedings, and electronic transcripts of public hearings.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: final filed rules permanently; all other rule material rule is published, and ; Electronic: final filed rules permanently; all other rule material rule is published, and
